pi_items.source: Task setup_task.sh constructs ROOM_URL as ${JITSI_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:8080}/VirtualFitnessQ4; confirmed in docker-compose.yml and task.json description
Task description and verifier.py explicitly reference this display name; Jitsi Meet accepts arbitrary string display names through pre-join screen

Verified against official Jitsi Meet source code (GitHub jitsi/jitsi-meet master branch lang/main.json). The video quality slider contains four options: 'Audio only' (AUD), 'Low definition' (LD), 'Standard definition' (SD), 'High definition' (HD). This is the exact label used in Jitsi Meet's UI.

Verified in docker-compose.yml (line 7: port mapping '8080:80', line 25: PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080). setup_jitsi.sh waits for http://localhost:8080 (lines 78, 84) and confirms Jitsi Meet runs at this URL.

privileged_info_summary: This is a Jitsi Meet video quality adjustment task in a local environment. The task requires joining meeting room 'VirtualFitnessQ4' with display name 'Coach Martinez' on a locally-hosted Jitsi Meet instance at http://localhost:8080. The agent must navigate to the video quality settings and set the quality to 'Low definition', which is one of four valid Jitsi Meet quality options (Audio only, Low definition, Standard definition, High definition). All metadata values have been verified against the official Jitsi Meet source code and the local environment configuration.
